name: AirPort Utility
description: Apple utility for configuring AirPort Wi-Fi base stations

version_check.note: No remote version-check API. Updates with macOS system updates. Version is keyed to macOS build.

download.note: Distributed via macOS Software Update (softwareupdate CLI or System Settings). Historic standalone DMGs from support.apple.com/kb/DL1817 may be rotated/404'd.

changelog.note: Search 'AirPort' in Apple security release notes. No dedicated changelog.

release_date.note: Version mapping: macOS 14/15 ships 6.3.9. Version only changes with macOS point releases.

notes: AirPort hardware discontinued April 2018. On macOS Ventura (13)+, AirPort Utility is no longer pre-installed — must download via System Settings > General > Software Update. No standalone download URL. NOT on Mac App Store for macOS (iOS listing ID 427276530 is the iOS version). This app is impractical to track remotely — the profile exists for reporting on currently-installed version only.
